name: coretex-launch-v16-atom-300k-mirfull-temporal-conflict-motif + liveEvalPack(limit=8, temporal_update)
notes: Large payloads are not stored in plain git. Publish them under artifact storage and set CORETEX_ARTIFACT_BASE_URL, or place them at the expected local paths before running setup.
The active materialized corpus cache is required for validator replay/evolve setup and is generated locally from verified corpus+embeddings+bundle/profile inputs. It is not a source-of-truth payload.
Post-evolve corpus states should be replayed from the launch corpus plus accepted state advances/deltas, not shipped as replacement launch corpora.

stateReplay.rule: Replay accepted state advances/deltas from this base corpus/root. Do not hydrate a post-evolve corpus as the canonical launch corpus.

s3.access: public-read GetObject on launch prefix; write/admin private

s3ConsistencyCheck.method: local cutover manifest for coordinator/scorer-sync; bundle bytes are committed locally and copied to the scorer during cutover, not republished by this manifest

notes: Live C1 cutover configuration intentionally lowers the screener band to 150ppm while keeping state advance at 750ppm (500 min improvement + 250 replay tolerance + unavailable baseline variance).
The production runner proof for the first forced evolve used this manifest shape with churn=0.002, 113 estimated embeddings, 8 fresh hidden, 0 removals, and root-delta pressure 8.
Coordinator/scorer sync copy the committed local mirfull bundle at cutover time; this manifest does not imply a new public S3 bundle publish.

coordinatorWorkPolicyHashNote: CORETEX_WORK_POLICY_HASH MUST be set to this on-chain V4.activeCoreTexPolicyHash(epoch) value for C1 receipts. The 'workPolicyHash' field is the OFF-chain @botcoin/coretex DEFAULT_CORETEX_WORK_POLICY provenance hash.
